value.fullName: Atlantic Standard Time (AST) - UTC−04:00 (Puerto Rico, U.S. Virgin Islands)
value.label: Atlantic Standard Time (AST) - UTC−04:00 (Puerto Rico, U.S. Virgin Islands)

value.fullName: Eastern Standard Time (EST) - UTC−05:00 (Eastern US states)
value.label: Eastern Standard Time (EST) - UTC−05:00 (Eastern US states)

value.fullName: Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) - UTC−04:00 (Eastern US, DST)
value.label: Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) - UTC−04:00 (Eastern US, DST)

value.fullName: Central Standard Time (CST) - UTC−06:00 (Central US states)
value.label: Central Standard Time (CST) - UTC−06:00 (Central US states)

value.fullName: Central Daylight Time (CDT) - UTC−05:00 (Central US, DST)
value.label: Central Daylight Time (CDT) - UTC−05:00 (Central US, DST)

value.fullName: Mountain Standard Time (MST) - UTC−07:00 (Mountain US states)
value.label: Mountain Standard Time (MST) - UTC−07:00 (Mountain US states)

value.fullName: Mountain Daylight Time (MDT) - UTC−06:00 (Mountain US, DST)
value.label: Mountain Daylight Time (MDT) - UTC−06:00 (Mountain US, DST)

value.fullName: Pacific Standard Time (PST) - UTC−08:00 (West Coast states)
value.label: Pacific Standard Time (PST) - UTC−08:00 (West Coast states)

value.fullName: Pacific Daylight Time (PDT) - UTC−07:00 (West Coast, DST)
value.label: Pacific Daylight Time (PDT) - UTC−07:00 (West Coast, DST)

value.fullName: Hawaii-Aleutian Standard Time (HAST) - UTC−10:00 (Hawaii, no DST)
value.label: Hawaii-Aleutian Standard Time (HAST) - UTC−10:00 (Hawaii, no DST)

value.fullName: Chamorro Standard Time (ChST) - UTC+10:00 (Guam, Northern Mariana Islands)
value.label: Chamorro Standard Time (ChST) - UTC+10:00 (Guam, Northern Mariana Islands)
